content: {"file": "backend/api/ingest_jobs.py", "summary": "This file manages in-memory status tracking for one-time PDF/codebase ingestion background jobs. It provides functions to register a job, update its progress, finish or fail it based on the outcome, and retrieve the current state of a job.", "rules": [{"name": "Register Job", "description": "Registers a new job with specified kind.", "conditions": ["job_id is unique"], "actions": ["Create a new entry in _jobs dictionary with initial status 'running'"]}, {"name": "Update Progress", "description": "Updates the progress of an existing job.", "conditions": ["Job exists in _jobs"], "actions": ["Set 'progress' field to provided done and total values"]}, {"name": "Finish Job", "description": "Marks a job as finished with result data or error if present.", "conditions": ["Job exists in _jobs", "Result contains errors"], "actions": ["Update status to 'done' or 'error'", "Set 'result' field to provided result", "Store any errors"]}, {"name": "Fail Job", "description": "Marks a job as failed with an error message.", "conditions": ["Job exists in _jobs"], "actions": ["Set status to 'error'", "Append error message to 'errors' list"]}, {"name": "Get Ingest Job", "description": "Retrieves the current state of a job if it exists.", "conditions": ["job_id is valid"], "actions": ["Return job details from _jobs dictionary or None"]}], "dependencies": []}
